case_title: A AND T JEWELERS VS HERMAN RONA et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,600.00 FILED BY A AND T JEWELERS AS TO DEFENDANT HERMAN RONA DESIGNERS MANUFACTURING INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-18-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
POS INVALID TO RONA HERMANS (DESIGNER MANUFAC- TURING), NOT MAILING DONE ON SUBSERVICE.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF A AND T JEWELERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DESIGNERS MANUFACTURING INC $1,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,608.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
